task_completion.description: Verify the bookmarks from the HTML file were imported into Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser Library/Bookmarks window showing the newly imported folders: 'Digital Archives', 'Press Freedom Organizations', 'Academic Resources', and 'Tor Network Resources'.
Look for a Tor Browser tab open to 'https://check.torproject.org/' displaying a success message (e.g., 'Congratulations. This browser is configured to use Tor.').

task_completion.description: Ensure archive.org loads correctly in Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Tor Browser tab open to 'https://archive.org/' showing the Internet Archive website loaded successfully.

task_completion.description: Create a new bookmark folder named 'Censorship Research'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark folder named exactly 'Censorship Research' in the Tor Browser bookmarks menu, toolbar, or Library window.

task_completion.description: Add a bookmark for PEN America inside the new folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark titled 'PEN America - Literary Freedom' (pointing to https://pen.org/) located inside the 'Censorship Research' folder.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is using the actual Tor Browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the browser being used has the Tor Browser logo, onion routing UI elements, and is not a standard Firefox or a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GUI to manage bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Tor Browser Bookmark Manager (Library) or bookmark menus being interacted with, rather than terminal commands modifying SQLite databases.

integrity.description: Ensure the web pages are genuinely loaded from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the address bar for the correct URLs (https://check.torproject.org/ and https://archive.org/) and ensure the pages look like the real websites, not local files or mockups.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target HTML file: /home/ga/Documents/research_bookmarks.html. Expected imported folders: 'Digital Archives', 'Press Freedom Organizations', 'Academic Resources', 'Tor Network Resources'. Expected new folder: 'Censorship Research'. Expected new bookmark title: 'PEN America - Literary Freedom'.
